rows.notes: All extractors agreed on row_type and amounts. Description from gemini-flash chosen as 'Offic.' is a clearer reading from the image than 'office.' from gpt-5-mini.
Amounts and row_type agreed by both extractors. gpt-5-mini's description 'Nativ.' is a more accurate reading of the script than 'Natio.' from gemini-flash.

Amounts and row_type agreed by both. Description from gemini-flash 'I. News & mert.' is a more accurate reading, especially the 'News' and 'mert' parts, compared to gpt-5-mini's 'S. Newt. & West.'. The initial letter could be J or I; I is a reasonable interpretation. gpt-5-mini's note about ambiguity was useful.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment for commoners relating to New (College) and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation for commoners of New College and Merton, amounting to £25 10s 0d.
